name: signal-q
description: Signal Q - Autonomous Transcendence Agent API

scripts.dev: cd worker && npx wrangler dev index.js --remote --port 8787
scripts.validate: npm run secret-scan && npm audit && npm run validate:openapi
scripts.build: echo 'Validation build - checking worker syntax and OpenAPI spec' && cd worker && node -c index.js && echo '✅ Worker syntax is valid' && cd .. && npm run validate:openapi && echo '✅ OpenAPI specification is valid'

author: quilross
